title: Yibl@`am #2991
definition:
Ibleam = "devouring the people"

 1) a city of Manasseh apparently located in the territory of either
    Issachar or Asher
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ibleam = "devouring the people"

 1) a city of Manasseh apparently located in the territory of either
    Issachar or Asher

    NASB:  a city of Manasseh
